reviews.review_description:
Game NEEDS bug fixing.
It's not good, there's almost no content at all.

1. Lag (also on the Quest 3)
2. Guns, handle horribly. Pistol can't be 2-handed normally, and the rifle doesn't have a real holographic sight, no use trying to aim with that.
3. The explosive barrels shown in the video don't even work on the enemies.
4. The mag in the Mk/M4 isn't placed correctly.
5. No physics interactions with the characters? Lame.

DO NOT BUY
This game is the worst game ever when l went in l was tall but the only map you can actually play is the first one the bank makes every thing lag and the city also makes everything lag
we need punching and grabbing mechanic
It’s fun but their is not enough stuff to do and there’s like no guns

developer_response.body: Hey, glad you had fun. I'm going to update the game with more stuff!

reviews.review_description: Its a fun game and i get that its getting updated and other people need to get that in their head. Also there should be a tiktok page or discord server(i can build one for u, i make them for people alot) if so add me on discord: HansMunkMan
The gore is really glory and I love how they have made the game and the pistol is so good

This game is actually pretty fun in my opinion like the bank map is like my favorite also like pls fix the city map cuz that shi laggy as hell also there is some lag on the bank map so fix that while u at it but the game is actually pretty fun and good also can u add better like gore pr like more gore also pls add a shotgun that shi would go hard good game tho
How do I start the bank level? I’m just stuck in a sand box room
This game has no contact. There is nothing to write home about. Totally not at all like the main video.
I like this game but the lag is HORRIBLE. Glitches every 5 seconds impair my playing experience, anybody with motion sickness i don’t recommend this

reviews.review_title: Game has potential, But it's very boring
reviews.review_description: I know this is the first version of the game, but it needs lots of improvement. For one, their are only two weapons, which get very old quick. These arent my biggest issue however. My issue is with the npc themselves. The "euphoria" on these npcs dont exist like at all, they die after one single shot. There is also no gore anywhere like the description suggests. The blood splatters are pngs also. In all, I believe this game CAN be the euphoria gore game for the quest 2 but it has a long way. If the game constantly improves I'll give it a higher rating but for now I have to rate it a 2.
This game is amazing and good
i like the euphoria on the enemies but there arent many settings to change things like snap to smooth turn or dominant hand but still a fun game

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review. Glad you had fun!
